content:
Reference reply from 10: <think>The user is asking if crustaison@gmail.com is the only email I can access. Looking at my system prompt, it says "Default account is crustaison@gmail.com" in the Google tools section. But the question is whether I can access others.
The tools mention "Default account is crustaison@gmail.com" which implies this is the primary/only configured account. But could there be others configured? I should be honest - I don't know for certain without checking if there are other configured accounts.
